exercises.title: Parallelism Demo
exercises.description: Demonstrate quantum parallelism by creating a superposition and applying an oracle.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

H = np.array([[1,1],[1,-1]])/np.sqrt(2)

# Create equal superposition for n=2 qubits
n = 2
state = np.ones(2**n) / np.sqrt(2**n)
print(f'Superposition: {state}')
print(f'Each amplitude: 1/√{2**n} = {1/np.sqrt(2**n):.4f}')
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

n = 2
state = np.ones(2**n) / np.sqrt(2**n)
print(f'State represents all {2**n} inputs simultaneously!')
print(f'Amplitudes: {state}')
hints: Equal superposition has amplitude 1/√(2^n) for each basis state
